articles.description: Spurs hit the self-destruct button once more to leave Roberto De Zerbi frustrated as fight to avoid relegation looks set to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Tottenham 1-1 Leeds: Roberto De Zerbi frustrated as Spurs hit self-destruct button

articles.description: All the latest from Pep Guardiola's news conference as Manchester City look to close the gap to leaders Arsenal.
articles.title: Manchester City news conference: Rodri to train this afternoon - Pep Guardiola latest

articles.description: Former Georgia captain Merab Sharikadze is banned for 11 years for violating anti-doping rules, with five team-mates handed suspensions of up to six years.
articles.title: Merab Sharikadze: Ex Georgia captain banned for 11 years for cheating anti-doping rules

articles.description: NBA legend LeBron James could have played his last game for the Los Angeles Lakers after their defeat by the Oklahoma City Thunder in the play-offs.
articles.title: LA Lakers 110-115 Oklahoma City Thunder: LeBron James future unclear after play-off defeat

articles.description: Two months after many thought Antonin Kinsky would never play for Tottenham again the goalkeeper makes one of the saves of the season to earn Spurs a point in their fight for Premier League survival.
articles.title: Tottenham: Goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky earns redemption with huge save against Leeds United

articles.description: Southampton request more time to conduct an internal review after being charged with spying on Championship play-off rivals Middlesbrough.
articles.title: Southampton begin internal review over spying claims

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Engine rules, Alpine improvement, wet-weather racing and fitting in extra races

articles.description: Marcus Rashford has an uncertain future despite the on-loan Manchester United forward scoring a brilliant free-kick for Barcelona in El Clasico.
articles.title: Marcus Rashford's Barcelona future remains uncertain

articles.description: Danny Rohl says he has been assured of his position as Rangers head coach by the Ibrox board.
articles.title: Danny Rohl confident of Rangers future after board talks

articles.description: Matt Fitzpatrick's recent form puts him among the favourites to end a 107-year wait for an English winner at this week's US PGA Championship in Pennsylvania.
articles.title: US PGA Championship: Matt Fitzpatrick and the stats supporting his major tilt at Aronimink
